query:
INSERT INTO
            witness_inputs_fri (
                l1_batch_number,
                chain_id,
                witness_inputs_blob_url,
                protocol_version,
                status,
                created_at,
                updated_at,
                protocol_version_patch,
                batch_sealed_at
            )
            VALUES
            ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'queued', NOW(), NOW(), $5, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (l1_batch_number, chain_id) DO UPDATE SET
                witness_inputs_blob_url = EXCLUDED.witness_inputs_blob_url,
                updated_at = NOW()
